T0223.title: Crypto Theft
T0223.definition: Crypto theft refers to the illegal acquisition of others' cryptocurrency (such as USDT) through fraudulent means.
T0223.description: Black-market actors often use phishing links, malicious smart contracts, or private key theft to gain access to victims' wallets and transfer assets. The stolen cryptocurrency is typically laundered through mixers or money-muling platforms before being cashed out. Due to the anonymity of blockchain transactions, recovering losses is extremely difficult, and victims often face direct financial damage.
